title: SilkySpawnersX
description: Lets players mine and collect mob spawners with Silk Touch pickaxes.
body:
![Silk Touched Silverfish Spawner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e2c38e8b09099f51fc08f572ac39f2bf6e5e6ec_0.webp)

Mine and collect mob spawners with a Silk Touch pickaxe.

# ✨ Features
- Allows players to mine mob spawners with Silk Touch.
- Preserves the mob type when dropped.
- Drops as a spawner item that can be placed elsewhere.
- Permission support for admins to control who can use it.

# 📥 Installation
1. Place the .jar file into your server's plugins folder.
2. Restart your server to generate the config.yml.

# ⚙️ Configuration
- No config needed for default usage.
- Optional permissions for restricting access.
```
enablePermission: false
```

# 🔗 Links
Need a custom plugin? Message me on Discord: https://discord.com/users/primimity
